source: CFPB Consumer Response Annual Report 2025, Section 4.3, Pages 25-29

by_card_type.type: General-purpose credit card or charge card

top_issues.issue: Problem with credit report or credit score
Problem with purchase shown on statement

issues: Disputes resolved in favor of merchants despite documentation
Multiple contacts required before complaining to CFPB
Resulted in fees, interest, negative reporting
Auto payments didn't process as expected
Consumers unaware of late payment reporting until checking credit
Charged fees due to company delays
account_closures.company_response: Closures based on business concerns (suspicious activity), referred to Customer Agreements

issues: Fine print made rewards difficult to receive/use

key_insight: Credit cards have the highest monetary relief rate at 12%. Top issue is credit report problems - tying back to furnisher accuracy.
